title: Appa Ghasts
description: Turns happy ghasts into sky bison!
body:
All your happy ghasts will now look like Appa from ATLA!!

If you use Respackopts, there's an option to make only renamed happy ghasts look like Sky Bison

The accepted names are "Appa", "Sky Bison" and "Wind Buffalo"

by default you can also rename a bison "default" to make it a happy ghast

Thanks to Parzival_, This pack now has a bedrock port!
[download here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/texture-packs/appa-ghasts)

![Appa at the Eastern temple!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a2be9a01c35237aab0c824c7b452abb51e28abc_0.webp)

[![Affiliate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a4883838950998d67143440012948c2410ff03.png)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3131)
